Overview: All values displayed in the Value List are estimates based on real community trading activity, including current trade trends and item demand. The values are determined by analyzing trades made within the trading community and are intended to reflect general market opinions. They are not official prices or guaranteed values, and actual trade outcomes may vary depending on demand and market changes.
List founders: dark.9901 (Dark), kamal.t_t (Kamal), greenboy2009super (Sand), red_787677 (Red), .userr_01 (AZ), .developing. (Nova), rayan055963 (Stray)

CONTENT:        
Fruits: Devil Fruit values, PvP/PvE ratings, demand
Swords: Sword/weapon values, Dragon equivalence, PvP/PvE, demand
Accessories: Accessory values, Dragon equivalence, stat bonuses, demand
Misc Items: Fish, fishing rods, books, and other misc items
Gamepasses: Full-price gamepass values
Perm Fruits (Robux): Permanent fruit purchase values via Robux
Tutorial: Demand legend (color of the Demand cell):
Many traders want this — easy to trade
Few traders want this — harder to trade
